config.installCommand: if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then mv pyproject.toml pyproject.toml.vc_temp || true; fi && if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then mv requirements.txt requirements.txt.vc_temp || true; fi && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: choose requirements file' && if [ -f requirements.txt.vc_temp ] || [ -f requirements.txt ]; then REQ=requirements.txt; else REQ=requirements.base.txt; fi && echo "== VERCEL INSTALL: using $REQ" && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: wheelhouse check' && if [ -d wheelhouse ] && [ "$(ls -A wheelhouse)" ]; then echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: installing from wheelhouse into _vendor' && python -m pip install --no-index --find-links wheelhouse --target _vendor -r $REQ --no-cache-dir -v || (echo 'wheelhouse install failed' && exit 1); else echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: installing from PyPI into _vendor' && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --target _vendor -r $REQ -v || (echo 'pypi install failed' && exit 1); fi && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: ensure critical packages' && python -m pip install --no-cache-dir --target _vendor SQLAlchemy==1.4.46 greenlet==3.2.4 Jinja2 PyJWT -v || echo 'non-fatal: critical package install failed' && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: pip show sqlalchemy' && python -m pip show SQLAlchemy || true && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: pip freeze (system)' && python -m pip freeze && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: ls _vendor (top entries)' && (ls -1 _vendor | head -n 300 || true) && if [ -f requirements.txt.vc_temp ]; then mv requirements.txt.vc_temp requirements.txt || true; fi && if [ -f pyproject.toml.vc_temp ]; then mv pyproject.toml.vc_temp pyproject.toml || true; fi
